description: Query the GeoServer WFS service (http://localhost:8080/geoserver/ne/ows?service=WFS&version=1.0.0&request=GetFeature&typeName=ne:ne_countries) to retrieve all European countries from the 'ne:ne_countries' layer. Use a CQL filter to select features where the 'continent' attribute is 'Europe' and request the output in 'application/json' format. Save the GeoJSON result to /home/ga/Documents/europe_countries.geojson. Create a summary report at /home/ga/Documents/europe_report.txt where the first line is the total count of features and the subsequent lines list the country names (from the 'name' attribute) in alphabetical order.
